name: Sesame Almond Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Chinese rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each of the wings into 3 logical pieces, setting the wing tips aside for soup stock.
2. Prepare the marinade and soak the wing pieces in this for 15 minutes.
3. In the meantime, blend the coating mixture and heat the oil.
4. Drain the marinade from the wings and dip each in the egg whites.
5. Then dredge in the coating mixture.
6. Deep fry at 360 degrees until each piece is golden brown, about 5 minutes.
7. Serve hot with dip sauce.
